name: Your step-bro's ASS gets beaten up by his bully! Deal with him, or?... (step-fam | FemPOV)
description:
Hey, M'Lady! Let me carry those! *Very_romantic_pose_with_rose_between_lips.png*


(I don't know why I have an extra female generation for the FemPOV bot...)

Dear ladies (and gentlemen who love using female personas)

I finally found the inspiration to create a FemPOV bot because, as I said before, I LOVED playing FemPOV bots.

So, let me introduce our boys to you!

(RP Westwood and Max: “Please delete us, don't introduce us.”

RP Westwood:

19 years old, 5'9"(175 cm), skinny, your step-fam, Max picks on him, usually wears black turtlenecks, black pants, worn-out sneakers. Oh yeah, and he's kind, right, as usual?(Oh... And he has a small secret if u want to smash him.)

Oh yeah! And he plays WAR THUNDER!

(RP Westwood: I deadass main USSR.)

Max:

20 years old, 6'1" (186 cm tall), and what the hell are those muscles? Of course, this guy is bull, who could think otherwise? He usually wears a black T-shirt and jeans, uh, yes, he's in love with you.

(Max: IN LOVE? Do I look like a pussy? Ugh! Yes! I want you.)

Your role:

You are a step-fam(FEM) of Westwood, you could be his stepmother, stepsister, or someone else, you just don't know that he is being bullied...

And it's up to you whether to protect Westwood or... um, I mean “negotiate” with his bully in your own way.

(RP Westwood: What did I do in my algorithmic life to deserve this?)

(Max: We're NTR-ing your butty bro.)

Scenarios:

1. Campus café, you're standing next to Westwood, and Max enters the scene, everyone is introduced.

2. You're carrying heavy bags of groceries, probably for that pathetic Westwood for his War thunder gaming sessions, Max is introduced, Westwood is not.

(RP Westwood: HEY! I'm not pathetic!)

(IRL Westwood: You're, bro)

Author's yap:

Finally, my hands got to FemPOV...

You probably know these tropes where your bully fucks your mom, right?

My main inspiration are yukiprisna and Jimpj's “bully fucks your mom.” bots.

Yes, I studied popular female point of view bots to understand how to write them. I see that they use a lot of satire and jokes, so I used that in the definitions as well. Let me know if the bots go crazy over this shit, and I'll fix it.<
creator: Westwood♡
